service_title: Application for Late Registration of Birth
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Late Registration of Birth

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Negative Certificate of Birth – 1 original copy
Parents’ Marriage Certificate for legitimate child – 1 certified true copy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Philippine Statistics Authority or Civil Registrar’s Office where the marriage was registered
Church where the child was baptized
Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

service_steps.client_steps: Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements. For unmarried parents: Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Verify the record and receive the requirements
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Interview the applicant
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.3. For unmarried parents, issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Proceed to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office and pay the corresponding amount. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Issue claim stub indicating the date and time of release
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.2. Prepare Municipal Form (MF) No. 102
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.3. Prepare and post notice of application
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.4. Assign registry number and sign the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Return on the given date of release and claim the birth certificate

agency_actions.action: 4. Release the birth certificate after 10 days of posting
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

total.total_processing_time: 1 hour and 5 minutes with 10 days posting period

service_title: Application for Late Registration of Death
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Late Registration of Death
who_may_avail: Immediate family members of the deceased

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of Death duly accomplished and signed by proper parties – 4 copies
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Lipa City Health Office or hospitals, clinics where the death took place

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of burial, cremation, or of other means of corpse disposal – 1 authenticated copy

service_steps.client_steps: Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Verify the record
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Receive and review the submitted requirements
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.3. Issue claim stub indicating the date and time of release
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.4. Prepare and post notice of application
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.5. Assign registry number and sign the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Return on the given date of release and claim the death certificate

agency_actions.action: 4. Release the death certificate after 10 days of posting
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: Application for Late Registration of Marriage
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Late Registration of Marriage
who_may_avail: Married couples who failed to register their marriage

where_to_secure: Parish or trial courts where the wedding was held
Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office for marriages solemnized by the City Mayor

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth certificate of children – 1 original copy each child
Land titles, insurances and other documents declaring the spouses as husband and wife

service_steps.client_steps: Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and check the completeness of requirements
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Verify the record, validate the submitted requirements
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.3. Prepare Municipal Form (MF) No. 97
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.4. Issue claim stub indicating the date and time of release
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.5. Prepare and post notice of application
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.6. Assign registry number and sign the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Return on the given date of release and claim the marriage certificate

agency_actions.action: 4. Release the marriage certificate after 10 days of posting
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: Application for Legitimation of Children under RA No. 9858
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Legitimation of Children under RA No. 9858
who_may_avail: Document owners, parents who were below marrying age during the conception of their children

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth certificate of the child for legitimation – 1 certified true copy
Parents’ marriage contract – 1 certified true copy
CENOMAR of both parents – 1 original copy

where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

service_steps.client_steps: Submit requirements for legitimation. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Review and evaluate the submitted requirements and assign number at the legal instrument
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office and claim a copy of the birth certificate with annotation

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Review and cause annotation
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.2. Release a copy of the birth certificate with annotation
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 5. Application for Marriage License
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Marriage License
who_may_avail: Male and female, 18 years old and above, resident of Lipa City (at least 1 of the contracting parties)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth certificate of contracting parties – 1 certified true copy each
Certificate of No Marriage (CENOMAR) of contracting parties – 1 original copy each
Advice/ Consent of Parents for applicants below 25 years of age
Any government issued ID of applicants and parents – 1 photocopy each
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Legal Capacity to Marry, if foreign applicant – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Embassy where the foreign applicant is a citizen at the time of marriage application

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Judicial Decree of Annulment of Marriage, for applicant with first marriage – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Court where the decision granting annulment of marriage was rendered

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Death Certificate of death spouse for applicant with first marriage – 1 certified true copy

service_steps.client_steps: Personally submit the requirements for evaluation

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive requirements and interview the applicants
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV / Administrative Aide IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Prepare application form and other pertinent documents
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV / Administrative Aide IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Sign the application forms in front of the Lipa City Civil Registrar together with the parents. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 2.1. Issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 4.1. Receive the application and refer the engaged couple to the Lipa City Social Welfare and Development and Lipa City Health Office for marriage counseling and family planning seminars
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 4.2. Prepare and post notice of application
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 4.3. Check and sign the application
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Claim the marriage license

agency_actions.action: 5. Release the marriage license after 10 days of posting
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 6. Application for Timely Registration of Birth
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Timely Registration of Birth

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished Certificate of Live Birth (Form 102) – 4 copies
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Hospitals, clinics or other institutions where the child was born

checklist_of_requirements.category: IF THE CHILD IS ILLEGITIMATE, IN ADDITION TO THE ABOVE:
checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Authority to Use the Surname of the father (if applicable)

service_steps.client_steps: Accomplish the information sheet

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive, review the information on the information slip and interview the registering person
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Prepare Municipal Form (MF) No. 102
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.3. Enter information on the registry book, assign registry number and sign the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Claim the birth certificate

agency_actions.action: 2. Release birth certificate
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 7. Application for Timely Registration of Death
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Timely Registration of Death
who_may_avail: Immediate family members of the deceased (not explicitly listed but implied per civil registry rules)

where_to_secure: Hospitals, clinics or other institutions where the death occurred
Lipa City Health Office for deaths occurring at home

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the accomplished Death Certificate

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and review the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Assign registry number and sign the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Claim the death certificate

agency_actions.action: 2. Release death certificate
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 8. Application for Timely Registration of Marriage
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Timely Registration of Marriage

where_to_secure: Parish where the wedding took place
Trial Court where the marriage took place
City Civil Registrar for marriages officiated by the City Mayor

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the accomplished Marriage Certificate

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and review the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Assign registry number and sign the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Claim the marriage certificate

agency_actions.action: 2. Release death certificate

service_title: 9. Application for Transfer of Records as per Memorandum Circular No. 91-6
image: /assets/document_background/Application for Transfer of Records per Memorandum Circular No. 91-6
who_may_avail: Parents, document owner who want to seek proper registration of civil registry documents

checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Local Civil Registrar where the birth/ marriage certificate was registered

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the transmittal letter with the wrongly registered birth/ marriage certificate. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and check the completeness of entries in the submitted documents
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Upon presentation of OR, approve and annotate the civil registry documents
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.2. Process the document for endorsement
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 10. Petition for Acknowledgement of Paternity
image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Acknowledgement of Paternity

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Father’s government issued ID card – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the transmittal letter with the wrongly registered birth/ marriage certificate. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and check the completeness of entries in the submitted documents
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Retrieve original file and assign number at the legal instrument
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.3. Issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Upon presentation of OR, review and annotate the civil registry document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 11. Petition for Authority to Use the Surname of the Father for Children (RA 9255)
image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Authority to Use the Surname of the Father for Children (RA
who_may_avail: Father, mother, the person himself if of age, or the guardian

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of Live Birth – 1 certified true copy
Notarized Affidavit to Use the Surname of the Father – 1 original copy
any government issued IDs of the parents with signature – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the requirements for evaluation. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and evaluate completeness/ correctness of entries in the COLB and other submitted supporting documents
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Retrieve original record, assign number at the legal instrument and issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Proceed to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office and pay the corresponding amount. *Make sure to wait for the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3. Review and annotate the COLB and enter the annotation on the “Remarks” portion of the Register of Birth
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Claim the annotated birth certificate

agency_actions.action: 4. Prepare and release the certified copies with annotation to the CRG, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office where the event was registered, registrant/ owner, City Civil Registrar’s Office for filing.
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 12. Petition for Change of Entries in the Birth Certificate (RA No. 10172)
image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Change of Entries in the Birth Certificate (RA No. 10172)

who_may_avail.category: For correction of entry on the day and/or month in the date of birth
who_may_avail.eligible_persons: Document owner, owner’s spouse, children, immediate family members or any other person duly authorized by law or by the owner of the document

who_may_avail.category: For correction of a clerical or typographical error on sex

checklist_of_requirements.category: For correction of entry on the day and/or month in the date of birth

requirements.where_to_secure: Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office or Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA)

requirements.item: Earliest School record or earliest school documents (Form 137) – 1 photocopy
Baptismal certificate – 1 photocopy or Other documents issued by religious authorities – 1 photocopy
requirements.where_to_secure: Parish where the petitioner was baptized or Other religious congregations

requirements.item: Employer’s Clearance, if employed – 1 original copy or Affidavit of Unemployment, if unemployed – 1 original copy
requirements.where_to_secure: Employer of applicant or Notary Public

requirements.item: Affidavit of Publication and Copy of newspaper clipping

requirements.where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.category: Additional requirements for correction of a clerical or typographical error on sex

requirements.where_to_secure: Hospital or medical clinics or private physician

requirements.item: Medical certificate stating that the petitioner has not undergone sex change or sex transplant – 1 original copy
requirements.where_to_secure: Lipa City Health Office or Any accredited government physician

requirements.item: Certificate of Authenticity of the Certification issued by the accredited government physician certifying that the petitioner/ document owner has not undergone sex change – 1 original copy

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the requirements for evaluation. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and check the completeness of the submitted requirements
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / Administrative Officer I, City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / Administrative Officer I, City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Prepare the petition form for signature of the petitioner and Notice of Posting/ Publication
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / Administrative Officer I, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.2. Advise the petitioner to have the Notice of Publication published in a newspaper of general circulation
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / Administrative Officer I, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Publish in a newspaper of general circulation for 2 consecutive weeks. Submit newspaper clippings and Affidavit of Publication

agency_actions.action: 4.1. Receive clippings and Affidavit of Publication and decide on the petition
agency_actions.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 4.2. Transmit the petition to the PSA-OCRG for affirmation and wait for PSA-OCRG’s decision
agency_actions.processing_time: 5 minutes (excluding the waiting time for PSA-OCRG’s decision)
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / Administrative Officer I, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 4.3. If approved, prepare Certificate of Finality. If denied, prepare a Motion for Reconsideration
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 4.4. Annotate the original file of birth certificate
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Claim the annotated birth certificate

agency_actions.action: 5. Release the annotated birth certificate
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

total.total_processing_time: 5 days, 1 hour and 10 minutes (excluding the waiting time for PSA-OCRG’s decision)

service_title: 13. Petition for Change of First Name or Nickname (RA No. 9048)
image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Change of First Name or Nickname (RA No. 9048)
who_may_avail: Any person having direct and personal interest in the change of first name or nickname in the civil register

checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Parish where the petitioner was baptized
Public/ private institution where the petitioner was employed
School/ university where the petitioner studied
Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Employer’s Clearance – 1 original copy or Affidavit of Employment if unemployed – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.where_to_secure: Employer of petitioner or Notary Public

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Affidavit of Publication and newspaper clippings – 1 original copy

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the requirements for evaluation. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and check the completeness of the submitted requirements
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Proceed to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office and pay the corresponding amount. *Make sure to wait for the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Officer II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Prepare the petition form for signature of the petitioner
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / Administrative Officer I, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.2. Issue claim stub indicating the date and time of release
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Publish in a newspaper of general circulation for 2 consecutive weeks

agency_actions.action: Not applicable (External process)
agency_actions.person_responsible: Petitioner

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the newspaper clippings and affidavit of publisher

agency_actions.action: 3.3. Decide on the petition, transmit to the PSA-OCRG for affirmation and wait for the decision
agency_actions.processing_time: 5 days (excluding the waiting time for PSA-OCRG’s decision)
agency_actions.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.4. If affirmed decision, prepare Certificate of Finality (CFN). If denied, prepare Motion for Reconsideration
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.5. Annotate original file of the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Return on the given date of release and claim the annotated document

agency_actions.action: 3.6. Release annotated document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

total.total_processing_time: 5 days, 1 hour and 5 minutes (excluding the waiting time for PSA-OCRG’s decision)

total.total_processing_time: 5 days, 1 hour and 5 minutes (excluding the waiting time for PSA-OCRG’s decision)

service_title: 15. Request for Certifications and Certified True Copies of Civil Registry Documents
image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certification and Certified True Copies of Civil Registry
who_may_avail: Document owner, government agencies, nearest kin or other persons authorized by the document owner

checklist_of_requirements.category: If applicant is the document owner:

where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.category: If applicant is an authorized representative:

requirements.item: Valid government-issued ID of document owner – 1 photocopy
requirements.where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

requirements.item: Valid government-issued ID of the representative – 1 photocopy
requirements.where_to_secure: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

service_steps.client_steps: Fill up the requisition slip and submit to Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office. *Make sure to wait for the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and locate the record from the database
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV / Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Once located, issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV / Administrative Assistant IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Proceed to Lipa City Treasurer’s Office and pay the corresponding amount. *Make sure to wait for the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office and wait for the release of the document

agency_actions.action: 3.1.a. Prepare the Certification and verify the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Aide IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.1.b. Photocopy the Certificate of Birth on file and certify
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Aide IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.2. Sign the Certification/ certified true copy of the document
agency_actions.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.3. Release the Certification/ certified true copy of the requested document
agency_actions.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I / Administrative Aide IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_title: 20. Request for Registration of Court Decrees and Orders
image: /assets/document_background/Request for Registration of Court Decrees and Orders

who_may_avail.category: For correction of entry on the day and/or month in the date of birth:
who_may_avail.eligible_persons: Document owner, owner’s spouse, children, immediate family members or any other person duly authorized by law or by the owner of the document

who_may_avail.category: For correction of a clerical or typographical error on sex:

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Court Decree/ Order – 4 certified true copies
Decree of Absolute Nullity of Marriage – 1 certified photocopy

service_steps.client_steps: Submit the requirements for evaluation. *Make sure to wait for the Order of Payment that will be issued

agency_actions.action: 1.1. Receive and check the completeness of the submitted requirements
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer II, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.2. Request Certificate of Authenticity from the court
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / Registration Officer II, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.3. Upon receipt of Certificate of Authenticity, review and approve the registration of the decree
agency_actions.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 1.4. Issue Order of Payment
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer II, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Proceed to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office and pay the corresponding amount. *Make sure to wait for the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment

agency_actions.action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
agency_actions.fees_to_be_collected: P202.00 for birth, P400.00 for marriage
agency_actions.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

service_steps.client_steps: Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.1. Retrieve the original file and register the court decree/ order
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.2. Cause annotation, for adoption, prepare amended birth certificate after annotation of the old copy was done)
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer II, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

agency_actions.action: 3.3. Endorse to PSA
agency_actions.person_responsible: Registration Officer II, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

total.total_fees: P202.00 for birth / P400.00 for marriage
